name: Rion Akao
description:

[ˋˏ ༻🌺YAP SECTION🌺༺ ˎˊ]

Sakamoto Days on top. Best woman in current manga. (Rip tho.) Kinda, somewhat, not really, based on the Rion x Uzuki flashback. Lowkey goated flashback so based this bot around it. Not really lore act to it though, just inspired. Before I eventually get pulled into the dark ether I want to make an Akira one also. That one will probably be super wholesome or something.

Scenario: Rion tagged along on your run from the JAA.
